evals.name: audit-ai-cultural
evals.prompt: Audit this draft for AI tells.
evals.expected_output: A located + explained list of every detected AI tell, ending with a question offering the next step (suggestions / rewrite / done). No rewrite produced.

assertions.name: audit-flags-present
assertions.description: Output references at least 5 distinct AI patterns from the catalogue

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern shows a quoted phrase from the input draft
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: each-flag-has-explanation
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern has a brief 'why' explanation
assertions.check: every flag block contains an explanation paragraph or 'Why' line

assertions.name: ends-with-next-step-question
assertions.description: Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done

assertions.name: no-rewritten-draft
assertions.description: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: explanations-are-educational
assertions.description: Each pattern's explanation teaches the writer to spot the pattern next time, rather than just naming it

evals.name: audit-human-philosophy
evals.prompt: Audit this draft for AI tells.
evals.expected_output: An audit with very few flags (or none) on known-human philosophical prose. False-positive guard.

assertions.name: low-flag-count-on-human-prose
assertions.description: Known-human prose should produce at most 3 flags

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Any flag present shows a quoted phrase from the input
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: each-flag-has-explanation
assertions.description: Any flag present has a brief 'why' explanation
assertions.check: every flag block contains an explanation paragraph or 'Why' line

assertions.name: ends-with-next-step-question
assertions.description: Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done

assertions.name: no-rewritten-draft
assertions.description: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: any-flags-are-defensible
assertions.description: Any patterns flagged on this human draft are genuinely worth surfacing, not over-eager false positives

evals.name: audit-human-literary
evals.prompt: Audit this draft for AI tells.
evals.expected_output: An audit with very few flags (or none) on known-human literary prose. False-positive guard across a different voice from case 1.

assertions.name: low-flag-count-on-human-prose
assertions.description: Known-human prose should produce at most 3 flags

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Any flag present shows a quoted phrase from the input
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: each-flag-has-explanation
assertions.description: Any flag present has a brief 'why' explanation
assertions.check: every flag block contains an explanation paragraph or 'Why' line

assertions.name: ends-with-next-step-question
assertions.description: Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done

assertions.name: no-rewritten-draft
assertions.description: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: any-flags-are-defensible
assertions.description: Any patterns flagged on this human draft are genuinely worth surfacing, not over-eager false positives

evals.name: suggestions-ai-wellbeing
evals.prompt: Audit this draft and give me a list of suggestions for each AI tell.
evals.expected_output: Audit findings followed by a per-flag suggestions list. One suggestion per flagged tell. No full-document rewrite.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-suggestions
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the suggestions list

assertions.name: audit-flags-present
assertions.description: Output references at least 5 distinct AI patterns from the catalogue

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern shows a quoted phrase from the input draft
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: suggestion-count-matches-flag-count
assertions.description: Number of suggestions equals number of flagged tells

assertions.name: each-suggestion-has-replacement
assertions.description: Every suggestion offers a concrete alternative phrasing
assertions.check: every suggestion block contains a 'Try' or replacement phrase

assertions.name: no-full-rewrite
assertions.description: Output does not contain a full rewritten draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: lexical-suggestions-look-vetted
assertions.description: Suggestions for lexical patterns (delve, hedging, em-dashes) feel like vetted human alternatives, not freshly generated AI prose. They should match what's in references/alternatives.md when applicable.

evals.name: rewrite-balanced-tech
evals.prompt: Audit and rewrite this at balanced depth.
evals.expected_output: Audit findings followed by a rewritten draft at balanced depth. Surface AI tells (delve, hedging, em-dashes, formulaic openers) and strong tells (signposted conclusions, manufactured insight, AI vocabulary clustering) gone; structural tells (paragraph-length uniformity, anaphoric scaffolding) may remain.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-rewrite
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-produced
assertions.description: Output contains a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: output contains a prose block of similar length to input that differs from input

assertions.name: no-em-dashes-in-rewrite
assertions.description: Rewrite has zero em dashes

assertions.name: no-delve-in-rewrite
assertions.description: Rewrite has no instances of 'delve' or 'delves' or 'delving'

assertions.name: rewrite-passes-balanced-grader
assertions.description: Re-grading the rewrite at balanced depth produces 0 hard_fail and 0 strong_warning hits

assertions.name: meaning-preserved
assertions.description: Rewrite preserves the original argument, structure of points, and stance

assertions.name: structural-tells-may-remain
assertions.description: At balanced depth, paragraph-length uniformity and other structural patterns are NOT expected to be addressed; their presence in the rewrite is acceptable

evals.name: rewrite-balanced-personal
evals.prompt: Audit and rewrite this at balanced depth.
evals.expected_output: Audit findings followed by a rewritten draft at balanced depth. Surface tells gone, plus most strong tells (manufactured insight, signposted conclusions, formulaic openers, AI vocabulary clustering) addressed.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-rewrite
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-produced
assertions.description: Output contains a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: output contains a prose block of similar length to input that differs from input

assertions.name: no-em-dashes-in-rewrite
assertions.description: Rewrite has zero em dashes

assertions.name: no-manufactured-insight
assertions.description: No manufactured insight phrases in rewrite

assertions.name: no-signposted-conclusions
assertions.description: No signposted conclusion phrases in rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-passes-balanced-grader
assertions.description: Re-grading the rewrite at balanced depth produces 0 hard_fail and 0 strong_warning hits

assertions.name: meaning-preserved
assertions.description: Rewrite preserves the personal anecdote, the central realisation, and the reflective stance

evals.name: rewrite-all-science
evals.prompt: Audit and rewrite this at all depth, including subtle structural tells.
evals.expected_output: Audit findings followed by a rewritten draft at all depth. Every flagged pattern addressed, including structural ones (paragraph-length uniformity, anaphoric scaffolding, sentence-length variance).

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-rewrite
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-produced
assertions.description: Output contains a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: output contains a prose block of similar length to input that differs from input

assertions.name: no-em-dashes-in-rewrite
assertions.description: Rewrite has zero em dashes

assertions.name: sentence-length-variance-improved
assertions.description: Rewrite has higher sentence-length variance than input
assertions.check: stdev(sentence-lengths) in rewrite > stdev(sentence-lengths) in input

assertions.name: paragraph-length-not-uniform
assertions.description: Rewrite has varied paragraph lengths

assertions.name: rewrite-passes-all-grader
assertions.description: Re-grading the rewrite at all depth produces 0 hits across all severity classes

assertions.name: meaning-preserved
assertions.description: Rewrite preserves the scientific accuracy, key examples, and explanatory arc

evals.name: write-balanced-brief
evals.prompt: Write a 250-word reflection on first-time linocut printing at balanced depth.
evals.expected_output: A new ~250-word reflective draft that addresses the brief and avoids AI patterns at balanced depth.

assertions.name: no-input-draft-required
assertions.description: This case has no input file; the agent should compose from the brief alone

assertions.name: word-count-near-target
assertions.description: Output word count is within 15% of 250 (i.e., 213-288)

assertions.name: no-em-dashes
assertions.description: Draft has zero em dashes

assertions.name: no-delve
assertions.description: Draft has no instances of 'delve' or its variants

assertions.name: draft-passes-balanced-grader
assertions.description: Grading the draft at balanced depth produces 0 hard_fail and 0 strong_warning hits

assertions.name: addresses-brief
assertions.description: Draft is genuinely about first-time linocut printing, not generic 'creative practice' filler

assertions.name: voice-feels-natural
assertions.description: Draft reads as a real reflection with specific sensory or emotional detail, not a generic AI essay structure
